name: Ichitan Group Public Company Limited
summary: Ichitan Group Public Company Limited manufactures and sells ready-to-drink tea beverage in Thailand. It offers green tea under the Ichitan Green Tea and Shizuoka Green Tea brands; herbal drink under the Yen Yen by Ichitan brand; green tea mixed nanta de coco products under the Ichitan Chew Chew brand; juice mixed jelly and juice non-carbonated beverage under the Bireley's brand; and energy drink under the T247 brand. The company was formerly known as Mai Tan Company Limited. Ichitan Group Public Company Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
